about.title: About SayIt
about.description: Hold to speak, release to paste. SayIt is an open-source desktop speech-to-text tool, licensed under MIT.
about.author: Author:

hotkey.title: Hotkey Settings
hotkey.systemKeyHint: For Fn, media keys, etc., use Preset mode
hotkey.holdDescription: Hold to record, release to stop
hotkey.toggleDescription: Press once to start, press again to stop
hotkey.doubleTapHint: In Hold mode, double-tap the trigger key to switch voice mode
hotkey.longPressHint: In Toggle mode, hold the trigger key for over 1 second to switch voice mode

apiKey.title: Groq API Key (Speech-to-Text + Groq LLM)
apiKey.instruction: This Key is used for speech transcription (Whisper). If Groq is selected as LLM Provider, it's also used for text enhancement.
apiKey.onboarding: Welcome to SayIt! Please set up your Groq API Key to enable voice input.

provider.title: LLM Provider
provider.description: Select the AI service for text enhancement and dictionary analysis. Groq and Gemini offer free quota, OpenAI and Anthropic are paid services.

providerApiKey.openaiInstruction: Get your API Key from OpenAI Platform
providerApiKey.anthropicInstruction: Get your API Key from Anthropic Console
providerApiKey.geminiInstruction: Get your API Key from Google AI Studio (free quota available)

model.title: Model Selection
model.description: Choose the AI models for speech transcription and text enhancement. Faster models respond quicker, while larger models offer better quality.

prompt.title: AI Enhancement Prompt
prompt.description: Choose an enhancement mode or customize your prompt.
prompt.modeMinimalDescription: Fix typos, remove fillers, add punctuation, keep original structure
prompt.modeActiveDescription: Reorganize into paragraphs and bullet points for easy scanning (similar to Typeless)

threshold.title: Short Text Threshold
threshold.description: When enabled, transcriptions below the specified character count will skip AI enhancement and paste the raw text directly. When disabled, AI enhancement is always applied.

app.title: Application
app.muteDescription: Automatically mute system speakers when recording starts, and restore when finished

copyTranscriptionToClipboard.label: Copy transcription to clipboard
copyTranscriptionToClipboard.descriptionOn: After auto-paste, the transcription stays in your clipboard so you can paste it again with Cmd+V — but it overwrites whatever you had copied before.
copyTranscriptionToClipboard.descriptionOff: After auto-paste, your previous clipboard content is preserved so you can keep using it.
copyTranscriptionToClipboard.enabled: Enabled: transcription will stay in clipboard
copyTranscriptionToClipboard.disabled: Disabled: previous clipboard content will be preserved

app.soundFeedbackDescription: Play sound effects when recording starts, stops, or encounters an error
app.autoStartDescription: Automatically start SayIt when you log in

recording.title: Recording Storage
recording.description: Recording files are saved to disk after transcription. You can play them back in history or use them for re-transcription.
recording.autoCleanupDescription: Automatically delete recording files older than the specified number of days
recording.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all saved recording files. History records will be preserved, but playback will no longer be available.

debugLog.title: Debug Logging (Advanced)
debugLog.description: When enabled, the app writes runtime logs (frontend and backend) to a log file, useful for providing diagnostics when reporting issues. Keep it off during normal use.
debugLog.enableDescription: Write runtime logs to a file

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your settings and dictionary to a single file for easy migration or reinstall. Optional password encryption.
backup.excludeKeys: Exclude API keys (protect secrets when sharing)
backup.plaintextWarning: An unencrypted export contains plaintext API keys. Keep it safe and do not share it.
backup.fileLoaded: Backup file loaded. Select what to restore:
backup.confirmDescription: Restoring settings overwrites your current settings; the dictionary is weight-merged (existing terms are never deleted). Continue?
backup.errorUnsupportedVersion: This backup was created by a newer version and is not supported
backup.errorDecryptFailed: Decryption failed: wrong password or corrupted file
backup.errorPasswordRequired: This backup is encrypted; please enter the password
backup.errorCryptoUnavailable: Encryption is not available in this environment
backup.dictImportDescription: Import a wordlist exported from another tool (e.g. Typeless): a plain .txt/.csv file (one term per line) or a SayIt dictionary JSON. Terms are weight-merged into your dictionary.
backup.dictImportEmpty: No importable terms found in the file
backup.dictImportTooLarge: File is too large to import

smartDictionary.title: Smart Dictionary Learning
smartDictionary.description: Auto-detect corrections after paste and learn new terms via AI analysis
smartDictionary.privacyNote: When enabled, the system reads text near the cursor for AI analysis. No original text is stored

azure.title: Azure / Microsoft Foundry
azure.description: Configure one Azure endpoint and credential shared by text enhancement and transcription.
azure.secretWarning: The client secret is stored locally — keep it safe.
azure.chatHint: Enter the name of your chat model deployment on Azure.
azure.notConfiguredHint: Enable and configure the connection in the Azure / Microsoft Foundry card above first.
azure.whisperHint: Enter the name of your Whisper model deployment on Azure.
azure.issueNotEnabled: Enable the connection in the “Azure / Microsoft Foundry” card above first.
azure.issueEndpoint: Enter the Endpoint URL in the connection card above and click Save.
azure.issueCredentials: Enter Tenant ID / Client ID / Client Secret in the connection card above and click Save.
azure.issueApiKey: Enter the API Key in the connection card above and click Save.
azure.issueDeployment: Enter the deployment name and click Save.

dashboard.emptyState: Start using voice input and your stats will appear here

history.emptyState: No transcriptions yet. Start using voice input!

dictionary.emptyState: No custom terms yet. Add frequently used terms to improve recognition accuracy
dictionary.description: Dictionary terms are provided to the AI during speech recognition to improve accuracy for proper nouns and technical terms.
dictionary.weightDescription: During each speech recognition, the top {limit} terms by weight are included in the AI recognition prompt. When the AI detects you repeatedly correcting the same term, its weight increases automatically.
dictionary.noAiSuggestions: No AI suggestions yet. Enable Smart Dictionary Learning to auto-learn new terms
dictionary.importHint: Migrating from another tool (e.g. Typeless)? Import your wordlist (.txt/.csv/.json) from Settings → Backup & Restore.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Permission Required
accessibility.description: SayIt needs Accessibility permission to listen for global hotkeys. Without it, the hotkey feature will not work.
accessibility.step1: Click the button below to open System Settings.
accessibility.step2: Find SayIt in the list and enable it.
accessibility.step3: Return to the app. It will automatically detect and activate.
accessibility.reinitializeError: Failed to reinitialize hotkey. Please restart the application.

errors.databaseInitFailed: Database initialization failed. History is temporarily unavailable. Please restart the app.

mic.permission: Microphone permission is required to record
mic.busy: Microphone is in use by another application

transcription.fileTooLarge: Recording file too large. Please shorten your recording
transcription.invalidAudio: Invalid audio format or incomplete recording data
transcription.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired
transcription.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later

enhancement.timeout: AI enhancement timed out. Raw text pasted instead
enhancement.modelDecommissioned: This model has been decommissioned. Please switch to another model in Settings
enhancement.invalidApiKey: API Key is invalid or expired
enhancement.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later
enhancement.badRequest: Model request error. Please check your settings

hotkey.conflictWarning: This key ({displayName}) may conflict with system shortcuts. Consider choosing a different key
hotkey.capslockWarning: CapsLock may be unstable in Hold mode on macOS. Consider using Toggle mode or choosing a different key
hotkey.presetHint: This key is available in Preset mode. Consider switching to Preset mode
hotkey.recordingTimeout: No key detected. Some system keys (Fn, media keys) cannot be recorded. Please use Preset mode.
hotkey.keycodeCollision: This key shares the same keycode as {target} on macOS. Both will trigger simultaneously
hotkey.escReserved: ESC is reserved as the global abort key and cannot be used as a trigger key

update.installFailed: Installation failed. Please download the update manually
update.checkFailed: Check failed. Please verify your network connection
update.autoInstallDescription: SayIt v{version} has been downloaded. The application will restart after installation.
update.newVersionDescription: SayIt v{version} is available. Click Start Update to download and restart the application automatically.

upgradeNotice.title: SayIt Update Summary
upgradeNotice.item1: Test Connection button: tap it in Settings to instantly verify whether your LLM and Whisper API keys actually work — no more wondering why nothing's happening after you've configured everything
upgradeNotice.item2: Gemini long-text truncation fixed: long passages enhanced with Gemini sometimes got cut off mid-sentence. This release identifies the root cause (thinking tokens consuming the output budget) and resolves it — your full text now comes through intact
upgradeNotice.item3: Clipboard isn't overwritten anymore: turn off "Copy transcription to clipboard" in Settings, and SayIt will restore whatever you had on the clipboard right after pasting — no need to re-copy what you had before just to use SayIt

featureGuide.subtitle: Here are all available features in SayIt to help you get started.

voiceInput.title: Voice Input
voiceInput.description: Don't want to type? Just talk. Hold the hotkey, say what you want, let go — AI cleans it up and pastes it right where your cursor is. Great for messages, notes, and emails.
voiceInput.steps: How to: hold hotkey → speak → release → text is pasted automatically

editSelection.title: Edit Selected Text
editSelection.description: See a paragraph you want to translate? Select it, press the hotkey, and say "translate to Chinese." You can also say things like "make it more formal" or "shorten to one sentence" — AI will edit it and put it right back.
editSelection.steps: How to: select text → press hotkey → say what you want → edited text replaces the original

hotkey.title: Hotkey Setup
hotkey.description: Worried about triggering it by accident? Set a combo key like ⌘+J so it only activates when you press both keys. Or keep it simple with a single key. Change it anytime in Settings.

triggerMode.title: Trigger Mode
triggerMode.description: Two styles: "Hold to talk" works like a walkie-talkie — hold the key to record, let go to stop. "Tap to start" is better for longer speech — press once to start, press again to stop.

quickModeSwitch.title: Quick Mode Switch
quickModeSwitch.description: Want AI to do more or less with your text? Double-tap the hotkey to switch between Minimal and Active modes on the fly. You'll see a confirmation pop up on screen. No need to dig into Settings.

promptMode.title: AI Processing Mode
promptMode.description: "Minimal" just fixes typos and adds punctuation — keeps your words mostly as-is. "Active" also tidies up the layout so it reads better. Want full control? Use "Custom" to write your own instructions for AI.

dictionary.title: Custom Dictionary
dictionary.description: Add proper nouns, brand names, and jargon so AI uses the correct spelling. Enable Smart Learning to let AI automatically pick up new terms from your corrections.

history.title: History
history.description: All transcriptions are saved. Search, copy text, delete records, or replay the original audio recording.
